body_excerpt: In LoadedPackage::Load of LoadedArsc.cpp, there is a possible out of bounds read due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to local information disclosure when parsing an APK file with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
